---
title: "Matchups"
subtitle: "Head-to-head team and player comparisons across every sport"
---

These reports compare two teams or two players side by side — works across NBA, NCAA, NFL, NHL, and MLB. Open the `.qmd` source, set both sides of the matchup in the settings block at the top, and re-render.

- [Team Matchup Report](matchups/team.html)
- [Player Matchup Report](matchups/player.html)
